title: goniophlebium subauriculatum
intro: Goniophlebium subauriculatum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Goniophlebium subauriculatum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound healing agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also applied topically to the affected area.
